radishes-with-nori-lemon-butter.name: Radishes With Nori-lemon Butter

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: trimmed, halved, quartered, and/or sliced (for serving)

instructions: In a small bowl, vigorously mix the zest of 1 large lemon, ½ cup (1 stick) unsalted butter (room temperature), ½ tsp. freshly ground pepper, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt to combine. Crush two .35-oz. packages salted toasted seaweed snack into the bowl and mix well. Taste and season the nori-lemon butter with more salt if needed.
Scrape the nori-lemon butter onto the edge of a platter. Arrange the mixed radishes (trimmed, halved, quartered, and/or sliced) around it and pile a large pinch of flaky sea salt alongside.

ramp-pesto-spaghetti.name: Ramp Pesto Spaghetti
instructions: Blanch ramp greens in a large pot of boiling salted water until wilted, about 10 seconds. Using a slotted spoon or spider, transfer greens to a bowl of ice water; drain and squeeze out liquid.
Bring same water in pot to a boil again and cook spaghetti, stirring occasionally, until al dente; drain, reserving 1 cup pasta cooking liquid.
Meanwhile, coarsely chop ramp bulbs and stalks (save or pickle the rest) and walnuts in a food processor.
Add ramp greens, olive oil, and 2 Tbsp. Pecorino; process to a coarse paste. Season with salt.
Toss spaghetti and ½ cup cooking liquid with pesto, adding more cooking liquid as needed until pesto coats pasta. Serve topped with more Pecorino and with lemon wedges.

recipe-for-brisket-stuffed-with-spinach-.name: Recipe For Brisket Stuffed With Spinach And Cheese
recipe-for-brisket-stuffed-with-spinach-.original_name: Receta de pechuga rellena de espinacas y queso
instructions: Start the recipe and prepare chicken prima. That type of cut can be ordered at the butcher's place, and that's a plate of breast, and that's an opening at the end to fill it up. Wash your pieces.
Now, heat up a frying pan with a tablespoon of olive oil, while at temperature, incorporates the spinach.
Mezcla, baja el fuego a medio y cocina por 5 minutos hasta que queden al dentes. Apaga, deja enfriar.
Produce and add spinach and add ricotta cheese with salt and pepper to suit. It's a good mix till it's as good as a dough. Reserve.
Toma las pechugas y condimenta con sal y pimienta por dentro y por fuera.
Warm a frying pan or grill with olive oil.
Posteriormente, rellena cada una de las pechugas con la mezcla de espinaca y ricotta. Presiona los bordes con palillos.
cook the breasts in the frying pan till they are golden and the chicken is soft and cooked.
Take them back and get ready. It's time to enjoy them. Be with your favorite garrison.

recipe-for-chicken-breast-stuffed-with-m.name: Recipe For Chicken Breast Stuffed With Mushrooms
recipe-for-chicken-breast-stuffed-with-m.original_name: Receta de pechuga de pollo rellena de setas
instructions: Start the recipe and prepare chicken prima. That type of cut can be ordered at the butcher's place, and that's a plate of breast, and that's an opening at the end to fill it up. Wash your pieces. Reserve.
Take mushrooms or mushrooms and cut them into pieces. Warm up a frying pan with some olive oil.
Incorpora las setas, con un poco de sal y pimienta y saltea por aproximadamente 4 minutos. Apaga y reserva.
Toma las pechugas y condimenta con sal y pimienta por dentro y por fuera.
Take the breast, fill with salted mushrooms, baked ham and mozzarella cheese. Press the edges with chopsticks.
cook the breasts in the frying pan till they are golden and the chicken is soft and cooked.
Take them back and get ready. It's time to enjoy them. Be with your favorite garrison.

recipe-for-potato-pancakes-with-tuna-com.name: Recipe For Potato Pancakes With Tuna
recipe-for-potato-pancakes-with-tuna-com.original_name: Receta de tortitas de papas con atún

ingredients.item: 700 gr de papas peladas y cortadas en trozos

instructions: Inicia tu receta y ten los ingredientes a las mano.
Put your potatoes in a pot with water, a little salt and cook very well till they soften. That'll last about 20 to 25 minutes.
Once the potatoes are soft, get them out of the pot and put them into a bowl. With the help of a fork or a potato shredder, do a purée till soft.
Cunaod have in purée, with salt and pepper to taste and incorporates the preserved tuna. Mix.
Then, add the egg and add some ground bread. Mix till everything's integrated.
With your hands, it forms 4 cm diameter pancakes and about 1 / 2 cm thick. Swallow with some flour.
In a frying pan, heat up oil with medium heat and fry pancakes between 2 and 3 minutes and cook them evenly. They have to be golden.
Coloca las tortitas en un papel absorvente hasta que se quite el exceso de aceite.
He goes with a salsa and enjoys.

recipe-for-squid-stuffed-with-cream-chee.name: Recipe For Squid Stuffed With Cream Cheese
recipe-for-squid-stuffed-with-cream-chee.original_name: Receta de calamares rellenos con queso crema
instructions: Inicia la receta, toma los calamares y limpia muy bien. Retira la espina del centro y quita todas las impurezas.
Then get the onion and cut into small notebooks and stick his garlic teeth.
Warm up a frying pan and add butter. When melting, add onion and garlic teeth. Meg and leap for 2 minutes.
Provençal herbs, salt and pepper are followed and incorporated to taste. Mix very well and finish jumping for another 2 minutes. Turn and put them out.
In a bowl, add the cream cheese and add the onion and garlic and spices pounding. Also add frosted bread and cut parsley. Mix up till everything's integrated.
Preheat the oven at 180 ° C
Continue and get the squid and fill with the cream cheese and other ingredients.
Once filled up, hold up the squids with some chopsticks so that the pilling remains inside the seafood.
Place on a plate and baker for 30 minutes at 180 ° C
Pasado ese tiempo, retira del horno y sirve con tus guarniciones favoritas.
Enjoy!

red-bean-soup-regional-recipe-teleculina.name: Red Bean Soup Regional Recipe
red-bean-soup-regional-recipe-teleculina.original_name: Sopa de feijão vermelho receita regional
instructions: Peel the potatoes and carrots and cut them into pieces; fix and cut the cabbage into strips; peel and chop the onions and garlic.
Light a pot with some olive oil, add the onions, garlic, carrots, potatoes and beans and saute a little.
Cover with water, season with salt, cook for about 15 minutes, then add the cabbage and let it boil until it gets tender. Retrieve the spices and serve hot.

red-beans-with-yogurt-lezzet.name: Red Beans With Yogurt
instructions: 1. * Extract the shells of Barbunya.
2. Add hot water to the pot and sprinkle until it is softened.
3. *Puted onion with olive oil in the island until pink.
4. Add bitter pepper paste and roast a few minutes.
5. Add additional barbunyas.
6. Taste with salt and pepper.
7. A tea glass on it pour hot water and close the cover of the pot.
8. Take the water from the stove.
9. * Peel and repel the shell of the skin.
10. Mix in the yogurt.
11. 11. Take the Barbunya to the service plate.
12. Pour yogurt with garlic on it.
12. August Decorate and serve with mint leaves.

revythada-sifnos-argiro.name: Revythada Sifnos

ingredients.item: Flour and water for sealing the vessel
Flour and water for sealing the vessel

instructions: From the night before, we soak the chickpeas in room temperature water.
Leave them all night long in plenty of water to swell. In the morning we rinse them well and put them in the clay vessel for the chickythada.

Add all the ingredients, chopped onions, olive oil, salt, pepper, bay leaves and water. The water we add must be necessary at room temperature and tilting the clay pot side to the edge of its lip and covering the chickpeas.
Cover the vessel with its lid and place it in the wood oven.
Allow the chickpea to simmer for many hours. Depending on the temperature of the oven, leave it for 6-10 hours in the wood oven.

ribeye-steaks-with-creamy-mustard-sauce-.name: Ribeye Steaks With Creamy Mustard Sauce As Made By Kiano Moju
instructions: Pat the steaks dry with a paper towel. Season generously on both sides with the salt and black pepper.

Add the olive oil and 1 tablespoon of butter to a nonstick or stainless steel pan over medium-high heat. Sear the steaks, one at a time, until a golden brown crust forms, about 5 minutes per side. If the pan gets too dry, add a bit more olive oil. Transfer the seared steaks to a cutting board to rest.
Add the shallots, capers, and remaining ½ tablespoon of butter to the pan. Cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the capers crisp slightly.
Deglaze the pan with the wine. Cook until reduced by half, about 30-60 seconds. Add the mustard and cream and adjust seasoning to taste.
Slice the steak into ¼-inch (6 mm) pieces and transfer to serving plates. Pour the sauce over the steak and garnish with sliced chives. Serve with roasted potatoes and a side salad.
Enjoy!

rice-pudding-and-cream-cheese-quesadilla.name: Rice Pudding And Cream Cheese Quesadillas: Sweet Recipe
rice-pudding-and-cream-cheese-quesadilla.original_name: Quesadillas de arroz con leche y queso crema: receta dulce
instructions: In a pot, boils both cups of water with cinnamon branch. Add the rice and cook with medium heat until fully cooked.
Incorpora la leche y endulza al gusto. Deja hervir unos minutos, retira del fuego y deja enfriar.
Mix corn flour with cinnamon powder. Add water little by little and amase to get a smooth and manageable texture. It forms 4 balls of mass with about 2.8 ounces each.

Put a ball of mass between two plastics and applicate with a tortilla press or a roller to form a thin circle. At the centre of each omelette, place 1 tablespoon of cream and 1 tablespoon of cold milk rice.
Dobla la tortilla y sella las orillas presionando con los dedos para evitar que el relleno se salga.

Warm abundant oil in a frying pan with medium heat. Fry the cheesadillas till they are golden and crispy from both sides. Remove them from the oil, scrape them onto absorbing paper and sprinkle sugar to suit before serving.

rich-shortcrust-pastry.name: Rich Shortcrust Pastry
instructions: Mix flour and salt together in a large bowl. Cut butter into the flour mixture until it is the consistency of breadcrumbs.
Lightly beat eggs together in a separate bowl; stir into butter-flour mixture. Add water, a few tablespoons at a time, and mix just until incorporated, using your hands to bring dough together.
Turn dough onto a floured work surface and cut into 4 portions. Refrigerate dough for 15 to 30 minutes before using.

rigatoni-recipe-with-sausage-and-peppers.name: Rigatoni Recipe With Sausage And Peppers
rigatoni-recipe-with-sausage-and-peppers.original_name: Receta de rigatoni con salchichas y pimientos
instructions: Retira las semillas y el tallo de los pimientos. Lava y corta en tiras. Haz lo propio con la cebolla y trocea los dientes de ajo.
Retira la piel de las salchichas y corta las en rodajas.
Warm up a frying pan with olive oil and fry the sausages till they get some light.
Incorpora los dientes de ajo y la cebolla. Mezcla y saltea por dos minutos.
Add the peppers, mix and pounce for another 5 minutes.
Vierte el vino blanco y desglasa el fondo. Cuece hasta que reduzca un poco el vino.
Add crushed tomatoes and sauona with salt and pepper to suit.
Mix and cook low fire for about 15 minutes till a salsa forms. Put your fire down to a minimum and reserve.
Cuece la pasta con agua y sal hasta que quede al dente.
Listen to her and book a quarter of a cup of cooking water.
Once the dough's ready, put it in the frying pan with the sausage sauce and pour the cooking water.
Sube el fuego a medio y mezcla suavemente hasta que todo se integre y la salsa emulsione.
Apaga y sirve caliente.
He's with parmesan cheese. Enjoy!

risotto-alla-milanese.name: Risotto Alla Milanese
instructions: Melt half of the butter in a medium saucepan over low heat. Simmer the onion and beef marrow in the butter for about 10 minutes. When the onion is soft, remove the onion and marrow from the pan using a slotted spoon, and set aside. (I like to leave the onions in.)

Saute the rice in the pan over medium heat for 5 to 7 minutes, or until lightly toasted. Stir constantly so the rice will not stick and burn. Stir in one ladle of beef stock, and keep stirring until it is mostly absorbed, ladling and stirring in more of the broth as well as the white wine in the same manner, until the rice is almost al dente. Stir in the saffron, remaining butter, and 3/4 cup of Parmesan cheese. Turn off the heat, cover and let sit for 4 or 5 minutes.
Serve as a bed for ossibuchi or by itself with as much of the remaining Parmesan cheese sprinkled over as you like.

roast-chicken-with-fennel-potatoes-and-c.name: Roast Chicken With Fennel, Potatoes, And Citrus

ingredients.item: Minced garlic plus 1 head of garlic
Kosher salt plus more for seasoning
Freshly ground black pepper plus more for seasoning

ingredients.prep: trimmed, each cut into 8 wedges, plus 1/4 cup fronds

instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Toast fennel seeds in a small dry skillet over medium heat, stirring often, until fragrant and slightly darker, 2–3 minutes. Let cool; finely grind in spice mill. Mix fennel, lemon zest, garlic, 4 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. pepper, and red pepper flakes in a small bowl. Set spice mixture aside.

Place fennel wedges, potatoes, carrots, shallots, and lemon and orange slices in a large heavy roasting pan. Drizzle 4 Tbsp. oil over, season with salt and pepper, and toss well to coat. Spread out in an even layer.
Rub remaining 4 Tbsp. oil all over the chickens. Season chickens inside and out with spice mixture. Stuff each chicken with a lemon half and half head of garlic. Tie legs together loosely with twine.

Set a roasting rack over vegetables in pan; place chickens on rack. Roast until chickens are cooked through and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of thighs registers 165°, about 1 hour.
Preheat broiler. Transfer chickens to a carving board and let rest for 15 minutes.

Meanwhile, place roasting pan on stove over 2 burners. Transfer lemon and orange slices to a small bowl. Cook vegetables over medium heat, stirring often, until liquid is evaporated, 8–10 minutes. Set pan under broiler; cook vegetables, rotating pan once, until browned in spots, about 5 minutes.
Season vegetables to taste with salt and pepper. Squeeze juice from remaining lemon halves over vegetables to taste.
Carve chickens. Divide roasted vegetables and chicken among plates. Garnish with reserved citrus slices and fennel fronds.

roasted-acorn-squash-with-apples-and-cra.name: Roasted Acorn Squash With Apples And Cranberries
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Place squash into a large pot of boiling water; boil for 15 to 20 minutes. Transfer squash to a large bowl of ice cold water and set aside until cool enough to handle, 5 to 10 minutes.

Peel squash along the ridges using a vegetable peeler, then use a teaspoon or grapefruit spoon to dig out peel in the valleys of the squash. Slice squash in half and remove seeds and stem. Cut remaining squash into bite-sized chunks.
Combine squash, apples, celery, onion, and dried cranberries in a large bowl.

Combine brown sugar, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg in a small bowl. Add to squash mixture and toss well to combine. Pour mixture into the prepared baking dish. Add water and dot the top with butter. Sprinkle with walnuts.
Bake, uncovered, in the preheated oven until squash is fork-tender, about 1 hour. Add some liquid halfway through to prevent drying out, if necessary. Serve hot.

roasted-beet-tzatziki-salad.name: Roasted Beet Tzatziki Salad

ingredients.item: Equal parts torn fresh flat-leaf parsley leaves
Pickled beets; reserve a little liquid for garnish

instructions: In a medium bowl, combine all the ingredients.
Spread the tzatziki on two serving plates and top with the eggs.
In a medium bowl, combine the tomato, cucumber, chile flakes, radishes, poppy seeds, fresh herbs, and buttermilk. Season with a little sea salt.
Broil or sauté the pickled beets to slightly caramelize and blister the outer surface.
Top the eggs with the cucumber-tomato salad and the hot beets. Garnish with more herbs, a pinch of sumac, a little olive oil, and the pickling liquid from the beets.

roasted-carrots-with-creamy-nuoc-cham-dr.name: Roasted Carrots With Creamy Nuoc Cham Dressing
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Toss carrots and 2 Tbsp. oil on a large rimmed baking sheet and season with salt. Roast, tossing occasionally, until crisp-tender, 20–25 minutes.

Meanwhile, bring shallot, chiles, ginger, garlic, fish sauce, sugar, and 2 Tbsp. water to a gentle simmer in a small saucepan over medium heat and cook just until aromatics are soft, 8–10 minutes (you don’t want the liquid to reduce much). Let cool. Transfer to a blender, add lime juice and mayonnaise, and blend until smooth. With motor running, gradually stream in remaining ¼ cup oil; blend until emulsified. Season dressing with salt.
Drizzle dressing over carrots just before serving.
Do Ahead: Dressing can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

roasted-cauliflower-piccata.name: Roasted Cauliflower 'piccata
instructions: Set an oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler to high. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil.

Place cauliflower on a cutting board and trim off inedible leaves. Trim off the bottom of the stem, making sure to keep the core intact. Cut the cauliflower in half and cut 1-inch-thick 'steaks' out of each half. Place cauliflower steaks on the prepared baking sheet; reserve remaining cauliflower for later use. Brush both sides of steaks with olive oil; season with salt and pepper.
Cook under the preheated broiler for 10 minutes. Flip carefully using a spatula, then continue broiling for 6 minutes more.

Meanwhile, whisk together chicken broth, lemon juice, Dijon mustard, and cornstarch in a small saucepan and bring to a boil. Add butter and capers; cook, whisking constantly, for 3 minutes. Turn heat off and let sauce sit for 1 minute.
Divide cauliflower steaks between serving plates, drizzle sauce over the tops, and garnish with parsley.

roasted-golden-beet-salad-with-pea-shoot.name: Roasted Golden Beet Salad With Pea Shoots And Fennel Fronds

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: fennel fronds, and flaky sea salt (for serving)

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Place beets in a shallow baking dish. Drizzle with 2 Tbsp. oil; season with kosher salt and pepper. Add ½ cup water and roast until beets are tender and a paring knife inserted into the center meets no resistance, 50–60 minutes. Let beets cool slightly, then peel.

Cut beets in half and arrange on a platter. Whisk lemon juice, vinegar, and remaining 2 Tbsp. oil in a small bowl; drizzle over beets. Garnish with pea shoots and fennel fronds and season with flaky sea salt.

roasted-octopus-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Roasted Octopus Recipe

ingredients.item: Batatas assadas a murro para acompanhar

instructions: Place the octopus in a pan, cover it with water and bring it to the fire, letting it cook for about 50 minutes or until it becomes soft. Turn off the fire, season with salt and let it rest a little.

Drain the octopus from the broth and put it on a tray. Peel off the onions and garlic, cut the onions into half-moons and lick the garlic. Have around the octopus, water everything with olive oil and vinegar and season with sweet pepper, salt and pepper.

Take it to the oven, preheated to 180oC, until it's golden and refined. Remove from the oven and transfer to a tray. Add roasted potatoes to punch, morrine peppers and olives and cover with onionade and octopus sauce. Serve then, sprinkled with chopped coriander.

roasted-peaches-with-ricotta-buttercream.name: Roasted Peaches With Ricotta Buttercream And Breadcrumbs
instructions: Preheat oven to 250°. Whisk honey, vinegar, and ¼ tsp. salt in a medium bowl. Toss peaches in mixture until completely coated. Arrange peaches, cut side down, in a 3-qt. baking dish and pour honey mixture over top. Roast until fruit is just beginning to soften, 20–25 minutes. Turn over and continue to roast, occasionally basting with pan juices, until flesh is soft and gives when gently pressed but fruit still holds its shape, 25–35 minutes more. Let peaches cool in roasting juices.

Meanwhile, using an electric mixer on medium-high speed, beat butter, powdered sugar, and remaining ¼ tsp. salt in a small bowl until light and creamy, about 2 minutes. Add ricotta and beat, occasionally scraping down sides of bowl, until no streaks remain, about 1 minute. The finished buttercream will have a slightly coarse texture from the ricotta.

Toss panko, raw sugar, and 2 tsp. oil in a small skillet over medium heat to combine and cook, stirring and shaking pan often, until panko is golden brown (sugar will caramelize and turn medium amber before all the panko browns), about 3 minutes.
Just before serving, dollop buttercream in the center of each peach where the pit used to be. Spoon pan juices over, drizzle with oil, and scatter panko over buttercream.

roasted-pepper-and-lentil-soup.name: Roasted Pepper And Lentil Soup
instructions: Set oven rack about 6 inches from the heating element in your oven and preheat the broiler. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil.
Arrange red bell pepper halves, yellow bell pepper halves, and orange bell pepper halves onto prepared baking sheet with cut sides down.

Roast peppers under the preheated broiler until the skin of the peppers has blackened and blistered, 5 to 8 minutes. Place the blackened peppers into a bowl and tightly seal with plastic wrap. Steam as they cool until the skin has loosened completely, about 20 minutes. Remove and discard skins. Cut peppers into small dice.

Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat; cook and stir onion and carrot in hot oil until onion is translucent, about 10 minutes. Add garlic, tarragon, thyme, and paprika; continue to cook and stir until garlic is fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Stir roasted peppers, tomatoes, water, and hot sauce into the peppers mixture, place a cover on the pot, and cook until the tomatoes soften, about 5 minutes.
Pour vegetable broth into the pot; add lentils, bay leaves, salt, and black pepper; bring to a boil, cover the pot, reduce heat to medium-low, and cook until lentils are tender, about 45 minutes.

Pour soup into a blender or food processor no more than half full. Cover and hold lid down; pulse several time to get the soup to be only slightly chunky. Repeat processing until all soup has been blended.

roasted-pork-shoulder.name: Roasted Pork Shoulder
instructions: Preheat oven to 163°C (165 degrees C) with a rack in the middle of the oven. Line a large rimmed baking sheet with heavy-duty aluminum foil and a rack.

Stir together garlic, olive oil, paprika, oregano, salt, and pepper in a small bowl. Rub pork thoroughly with garlic mixture. Place fat-side up on rack on the prepared baking sheet. Let pork stand at room temperature for 30 minutes.
Bake, uncovered, in the preheated oven until a thermometer inserted into the thickest portion registers between 195 to 96°C (90 to 96 degrees C), about 4 1/2 hours.
Let stand 20 minutes before shredding.

roasted-squash-and-grains-with-tahini-ho.name: Roasted Squash And Grains With Tahini-honey

ingredients.prep: root end attached, cut into  0.75-inch wedges

instructions: Preheat oven to 450º. Toast farro in a small pot over medium heat, stirring often, until slightly darkened and kernels begin to make a popping noise, 4–6 minutes. Pour in enough cold water to cover farro by 1" and throw in a big pinch of salt; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, stirring occasionally, until tender, 20–25 minutes. Drain and transfer to a medium bowl.

Meanwhile, toss squash and onion with ¼ cup oil on a parchment-lined rimmed baking sheet. Season with salt and toss again. Roast, turning squash halfway through, until golden brown and tender, 15–20 minutes.

Finely grate zest of 1 lemon half into a small bowl. Squeeze in juice from both lemon halves (you should get about 3 Tbsp.). Stir in tahini, honey, 1 Tbsp. oil, and 1 Tbsp. warm water; season with salt. Transfer 2 Tbsp. tahini sauce to farro; season with salt and pepper and toss to coat.

Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. oil in a medium nonstick skillet over medium-high. Fry eggs (oil should be bubbling around edges), basting whites with a spoon to get them puffy, if desired, and rotating skillet occasionally, until whites are golden brown and crisp at the edges and set around the yolk (which should still be runny), about 2 minutes.
Divide remaining tahini sauce among plates. Top with farro mixture. Fold cilantro into squash mixture, then arrange over grains. Top with fried eggs; season with pepper.

roasted-squash-with-date-relish-and-pump.name: Roasted Squash With Date Relish And Pumpkin Seeds

ingredients.prep: each squash halved through root end

instructions: Arrange racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 375°. Spread out pumpkin seeds in a single layer on a rimmed baking sheet and toast on top rack, stirring once or twice, until lightly browned, puffed, and aromatic, about 7 minutes. Toss pumpkin seeds on sheet with 1 teaspoon oil and a pinch of salt. Let cool on sheet; transfer to a work surface and coarsely chop. DO AHEAD Pumpkin seeds can be prepared 1 day ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

Increase oven temperature to 425°. Place squash, cut side down, on a cutting board. Using a sharp knife, carefully remove peel. Cut squash lengthwise into 3/4-inch-thick wedges. Place squash, 1/4 cup oil, and thyme in a large bowl. Season with salt and pepper. Toss to coat. Divide squash between 2 large rimmed baking sheets, cut side down, in a single layer.
Roast squash, rotating sheets halfway through, until tender when pierced with a fork, 25-30 minutes; set aside.

Mix remaining 1/2 cup oil, 1/4 cup lemon juice, and parsley in a medium bowl. Season dressing with salt, pepper, and additional lemon juice, if desired. Place dandelion greens in a large bowl; drizzle with 1 tablespoon dressing. Season with salt and pepper; toss to coat. Add dates and Parmesan, if using, to remaining dressing in bowl for date relish.
Arrange dandelion greens on a large platter; top with warm squash. Spoon date relish over; garnish with pumpkin seeds.

roasted-sweet-potatoes-with-triple-cream.name: Roasted Sweet Potatoes With Triple-cream Cheese

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

Triple-cream cheese (such as saint andré or délice de
bourgogne)
. sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 450°. Roast 2 lb. medium sweet potatoes (about 6), scrubbed, on a parchment-lined rimmed baking sheet until very tender, 60–70 minutes.

Meanwhile, toast 1 Tbsp. coriander seeds, 1 tsp. cumin seeds, and 1 tsp. fennel seeds in a dry small skillet over medium heat, shaking pan often, until fragrant and slightly darkened, about 2 minutes. Transfer to a small food processor and pulse until seeds are very coarsely ground (you can also do this with a mortar and pestle).

Toast ½ cup raw pumpkin seeds (pepitas) in same skillet over medium heat, shaking pan often, until slightly darkened and starting to pop, about 4 minutes. Transfer to food processor and pulse until pumpkin seeds are very coarsely ground. Transfer seed mixture to a medium bowl and add 2 tsp. raw sugar, 2 tsp. smoked paprika, 1 tsp. chile-lime seasoning, 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt. Mix dukkah to combine.

Transfer sweet potatoes to a platter, split lengthwise with a small knife, and open up like a book. Using a fork, lightly mash flesh, making sure to keep skins intact; season lightly with kosher salt. Dot evenly with 6 oz. triple-cream cheese, room temperature, cut into 1" pieces (it will begin to melt). Stir 2 Tbsp. pomegranate molasses and 1 tsp. sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar in a small bowl; drizzle over potatoes. Spoon dukkah over (use all of it), top with torn tender herbs (such as parsley, dill, and/or cilantro), and drizzle with oil. Season with flaky sea salt.
Do Ahead: Dukkah can be made 1 week ahead. Store airtight at room temperature. Stir to break up any clumps before using.

roasted-veggie-quinoa-salad.name: Roasted Veggie Quinoa Salad
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350˚F (180˚C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Add the zucchini, sweet potato, tomatoes, onion, and corn to the baking sheet.
Drizzle with the lemon juice and 2 tablespoons of olive oil, then season with garlic salt and pepper. Toss to coat evenly, keeping the vegetables separate on the pan.
Roast for 15-20 minutes, or until fork tender.
Transfer the roasted vegetables to a large bowl, and add the quinoa. Toss well.
In a small bowl, mix together the remaining 2 tablespoons of olive oil and apple cider vinegar. Pour over the veggies and quinoa, and toss to coat.
Garnish with parsley.
Enjoy!

romesco-sauce-ingredients-and-step-by-st.name: Romesco Sauce: Ingredients And Step-by-step Preparation
romesco-sauce-ingredients-and-step-by-st.original_name: Salsa romesco: ingredientes y preparación paso a paso
instructions: Don't think about preparing this recipe from time to time. Ideally, at least one day's notice. The reason is simple: we have to take advantage of the night so that the peppers or mores will be hydrated or otherwise leave them a few hours submerged in water. If they really don't have all night to do so, care should be taken to get them at least for five or six hours.

The following day, or after rehydrates the mores, we have to fry the two pits of bread into some oil. In fact, there are two schools with respect to this step: those that take the time to fry bread and those that leave it in their natural state. I think frying them gives an additional touch of flavour to this preparation.
The oven should also be preheated at 200ºC and its garlic teeth and tomatoes should be roasted.
Hay que dejarlos unos 15 minutos en el horno. Mientras tanto, podemos aprovechar para pelar las avellanas y las almendras.
We can also use them to prepare the moors for their use, as we have to remove their nuggets and only reserve their pulp to prepare our salsa.
Once the garlic and baked tomatoes have been ready, they have to be carefully separated from their skin, and they should be completely clear after the cooking process.

To continue with the recipe, several ingredients will have to be passed through the blender. So, with respect to the treatment of hazelnuts and almonds we have to make a decision. Depending on the strength of the blender, these nuts can be fully incorporated, or, if they prefer, they can be first shredded with a deck or mortar and then passed to the mixer.
Once these are in the blender, we will also add tomatoes, vinegar, olive oil, baked garlic teeth, motif or peppers, gills and bread.

The ingredients have to be liquefied until they get a liquid mixture. Then we have to try the salsa, and if necessary, adjust the date with some salt. If that's the case, we have to liquefied again, to blend them well.
Y listo, ya tenemos nuestra salsa romesco.

rose-bourbon-and-blue.name: Rosé, Bourbon, And Blue
instructions: Stir sugar with 7 tablespoons hot water in a small bowl until sugar is dissolved; transfer to a food processor. Add 1 1/2 cups blueberries to processor and purée. Set a strainer over a large pitcher. Strain blueberry mixture, pressing on solids to extract as much liquid as possible; discard solids. Add tea, rosé, bourbon, and lemon juice to pitcher. Refrigerate until chilled, about 2 hours.
Cut remaining 1/2 cup blueberries in half; add to pitcher. Fill Old Fashioned glasses with ice. Divide cocktail among glasses. Garnish with lemon slices and serve.
